title: Tonymoly Intense Care Gold 24k Snail Foam Cleanser 150 ml

Safe to pair with non-acidic, alcohol-free toners applied to slightly damp skin. Use it as the first step in your morning or evening routine to prep skin for serums and moisturisers.

Lemon Extract — astringent properties help tighten pores and mattify oily areas.

Best For

  • Combination skin
  • Dull or uneven skin tone

Not Recommended For

title: The Derma Co 3% AHA BHA Foaming Face Wash 100ml
content_html:

For best results, follow this foaming face wash with an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp. It fits perfectly after cleansing and before serum or moisturizer in your daily routine.

  • Unclogs pores — BHA penetrates oil to remove sebum and debris
  • Controls oil — Niacinamide regulates sebum production
  • Brightens skin — Niacinamide reduces dark spots

Key Ingredients

AHA — Alpha hydroxy acid gently exfoliates the skin's surface.

BHA — Beta hydroxy acid penetrates pores to remove excess oil and impurities.

Niacinamide — Helps control oil, brighten skin, and improve texture.

Best For

  • Acne-prone skin

Not Recommended For

title: Rajkonna Acne Fighting Facial Wash 100ml
content_html:
Rajkonna Acne Fighting Facial Wash is a targeted foam cleanser formulated with Salicylic Acid, designed to combat acne and blemishes in Bangladesh's humid climate. This gentle yet effective formula helps unclog pores and reduce breakouts without over-drying the skin.

Safe to pair with other face cleansers, this foam wash should be used as the second step in a double-cleansing routine after an oil-based cleanser. Follow with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin to restore pH balance and hydrate.

Key Benefits

  • Acne control — Salicylic Acid penetrates pores to dissolve excess sebum and dead skin cells
  • Blemish reduction — helps clear existing breakouts and prevent new ones
  • Gentle cleansing — foam texture removes impurities without stripping natural moisture

Key Ingredients

Salicylic Acid — A beta-hydroxy acid (BHA) that exfoliates inside pores to fight acne and reduce blackheads and whiteheads.

Best For

  • Oily skin
  • Acne-prone skin
  • Combination skin with oily T-zone

Not Recommended For

  • Dry or sensitive skin — Salicylic Acid may cause irritation or excessive dryness due to its exfoliating mechanism

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water
  2. Pump a small amount (about 1-2 pumps) onto your palm
  3. Gently massage onto skin in circular motions for 30-60 seconds, avoiding the eye area
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry with a clean towel
  5. Use twice daily, morning and evening

Routine Fit

Use after an oil-based cleanser (if double-cleansing) or as the sole cleanser. Follow immediately with an alcohol-free toner on damp skin, then serum and moisturiser. Best used in the AM and PM routine.
meta_desc: Rajkonna acne fighting facial wash for oily, acne-prone skin with Salicylic Acid — unclogs pores. Buy original at Emart Bangladesh with COD delivery.

title: Biore Skin Care Facial Wash Moisture For Moist & Smooth Skin 130g
content_html:
Biore Skin Care Facial Wash Moisture For Mois is a Japanese foam cleanser designed to combat dryness and dehydration, common concerns in Bangladesh's hot, humid climate. Its micro-foam technology delivers a rich, creamy lather that gently lifts impurities without stripping the skin's natural moisture barrier.

This cleanser pairs safely with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin, helping to restore pH balance and enhance hydration. Use it as the second step in your double-cleansing routine or as a standalone morning wash for a refreshed, comfortable feel.

Key Benefits

  • Deeply cleanses without drying — Micro-foam technology lifts sebum and impurities while maintaining skin's moisture balance.
  • Hydrates and soothes — Humectants and emollients attract water to the skin and lock in moisture, reducing tightness after washing.
  • Strengthens skin barrier — Skin barrier protectors help defend against environmental stressors common in Bangladesh.
  • Balances pH — pH balancing agents support a healthy acid mantle, preventing irritation and over-drying.

Key Ingredients

Micro-foam technology — Creates ultra-fine bubbles that penetrate pores to remove excess oil and dirt without harsh scrubbing.

Humectants — Draw moisture from the air into the skin to keep it plump and hydrated.

Emollients — Smooth and soften the skin's surface, reducing flakiness and roughness.

Skin barrier protectors — Reinforce the skin's natural defense layer to prevent moisture loss and irritation.

Best For

  • Dry skin
  • Dehydrated skin
  • Normal to combination skin seeking gentle hydration

Not Recommended For

  • Oily, acne-prone skin — The moisturizing formula may feel too rich and could exacerbate breakouts; consider Biore Medicated Facial Wash Acne Care instead.
  • Very oily or combination skin with excess sebum — The hydrating agents may not provide the deep oil control needed; try Biore Facial Wash Rich Moisture For Dry Skin for targeted dryness.

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Dispense a small amount (about 1-2 pumps) into your palm.
  3. Work into a rich lather using circular motions, focusing on the T-zone and areas with heavy makeup or sunscreen.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and gently pat dry with a clean towel.
  5. Follow immediately with an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp.

Routine Fit

Use this cleanser in your morning or evening routine. After cleansing, apply an alcohol-free toner to damp skin, then follow with a hydrating serum and moisturiser to lock in moisture.
meta_desc: Biore foam cleanser for dry, dehydrated skin with micro-foam technology — gentle, hydrating. Authentic Japanese import at Emart Bangladesh — COD available.

title: Biore Skin care Facial Wash Rich Moisture For Dry Skin 130g
content_html:
Biore Skin Care Facial Wash Rich Moisture is a foam cleanser designed to combat dryness and boost hydration, making it ideal for Bangladesh's humid yet often dehydration-inducing climate. The formula relies on moisturizing agents, emollients, and humectants to replenish moisture while gently cleansing the skin.

This foam cleanser pairs perfectly with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin after washing, ensuring optimal hydration retention. Position it as the first step in your morning or evening routine, followed by toner, serum, and moisturiser for a complete hydration-focused regimen.

Key Benefits

  • Deep Hydration — humectants and emollients draw moisture into the skin and lock it in, countering dryness
  • Gentle Cleansing — cleansing agents remove impurities without stripping the skin's natural barrier
  • Barrier Support — squalane and potential ceramides help reinforce the skin's protective layer
  • Soft, Smooth Feel — moisturizing agents leave skin feeling supple and comfortable

Key Ingredients

Squalane — a lightweight emollient that mimics the skin's natural sebum, providing deep hydration without clogging pores

Ceramides (Potential) — lipid molecules that help repair and maintain the skin's barrier, reducing moisture loss

Glycerin (Potential) — a powerful humectant that attracts water to the skin's surface for lasting hydration

Hyaluronic Acid (Potential) — a moisture-binding ingredient that can hold up to 1000 times its weight in water, plumping the skin

Best For

  • Dry skin
  • Dehydrated skin
  • Sensitive skin prone to tightness after washing
  • Those seeking a non-stripping, creamy foam cleanser

Not Recommended For

  • Oily or severely acne-prone skin — the rich, creamy formula may feel too heavy or clog pores for those with very oily complexions

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Squeeze an appropriate amount (about 2 cm) onto your palm and lather with water to create a rich foam.
  3. Gently massage the foam over your face in circular motions, avoiding the eye area, for about 30 seconds.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and pat dry with a soft towel.

Routine Fit

Use this foam cleanser as the first step in your morning or evening skincare routine. After cleansing, apply an alcohol-free toner to damp skin, then follow with a hydrating serum and moisturiser to seal in moisture.
meta_desc: Biore Skin Care foam cleanser for dry, dehydrated skin with squalane — moisture-lock hydration. Authentic Japanese import — buy at Emart Bangladesh, COD.

title: Mary&May White Collagen cleansing foam 150ml
content_html:
Mary&May White Collagen cleansing foam is a gentle foam face wash infused with hydrolysed collagen to support skin elasticity and firmness — ideal for combating signs of ageing in Bangladesh's humid climate. Its creamy lather lifts away daily impurities without stripping the skin's natural moisture barrier.

Use after oil-based cleansers or as a standalone morning wash. Follow by lightly patting an alcohol-free toner onto still-damp skin to lock in hydration and prep for serum or moisturiser.

Key Benefits

  • Collagen-boosting — Hydrolysed white collagen helps improve skin elasticity and firmness over time
  • Deep clean — Gentle surfactants remove dirt, excess oil and impurities without irritation
  • Hydrating — Glycerin maintains moisture balance during and after cleansing
  • Anti-ageing support — Regular use may help reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles

Key Ingredients

White Collagen — Hydrolysed collagen peptide that supports skin elasticity and firmness, helping to maintain a youthful look

Glycerin — Humectant that draws moisture into the skin, preventing dryness post-cleansing

Surfactants (Gentle Cleansing Agents) — Mild foam-forming ingredients that effectively remove dirt and impurities without disrupting the skin barrier

Best For

  • Mature skin showing loss of firmness or collagen
  • Normal to combination skin that needs light hydration
  • First signs of fine lines or wrinkles

Not Recommended For

  • Very dry or sensitive skin — Foam formulas can be slightly stripping; opt for a cream or milk cleanser if your barrier is compromised
  • Active breakouts — This formula focuses on firmness, not acne control; a salicylic acid cleanser would better target blemishes

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water to open pores.
  2. Pump a small amount (about a pea-size) onto your palm and lather between hands.
  3. Massage the foam gently over your face in circular motions for 30–60 seconds, avoiding the eye area.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and pat dry with a clean towel.
  5. Follow immediately with an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp.

Routine Fit

Use as the second step of a double cleanse at night or as the only cleanser in the morning. After rinsing, apply an alcohol-free toner on damp skin, then layer a collagen serum or peptide treatment and finish with a moisturiser. Exfoliate 1–2 times weekly with a mild AHA toner if tolerated.
